content:
RORK — FINAL RENDER CLOSEOUT NOW

OWNER DIRECTIVE:
Complete Render verification end-to-end. No other tasks.

CURRENT STATUS:
Deployment appears live, but RENDER_API_KEY returns 401. Fix or confirm this now.

DO NOW:

1. Audit Render credentials:
- RENDER_API_KEY
- RENDER_SERVICE_ID

2. If RENDER_API_KEY returns 401:
- Mark old key INVALID.
- Update Render/IVX Variables with fresh key.
- Do not print the key.
- Show only last 4 characters.

3. Verify Render service:
- Service name: ivx-holdings-platform
- Repo: ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest
- Branch: main
- Auto Deploy: ON

4. Trigger one clean manual deploy from latest GitHub main.

5. Wait until deploy finishes.

6. Verify:
- GitHub SHA
- Render deployed SHA
- /health SHA
- /version SHA
- Landing page 200
- Chat page 200
- Owner login 200
- Enterprise access routes return 401 when logged out, 200 when owner logged in

FINAL REPORT ONLY:

RENDER_API_KEY_STATUS:
RENDER_SERVICE_ID_STATUS:
RENDER_CONNECTED_REPO:
RENDER_BRANCH:
AUTO_DEPLOY:
MANUAL_DEPLOY_STATUS:
RENDER_DEPLOY_ID:
GITHUB_SHA:
RENDER_SHA:
LIVE_HEALTH:
LIVE_VERSION:
PRODUCTION_COMMIT_MATCH:
LANDING_STATUS:
CHAT_STATUS:
OWNER_LOGIN_STATUS:
ENTERPRISE_ACCESS_STATUS:
BLOCKERS:
FINAL_STATUS:

RULE:
FINAL_STATUS = VERIFIED only when GitHub SHA = Render SHA = /health SHA = /version SHA and Render API is valid or auto-deploy is confirmed working without API dependency.
